海龟的起源笼罩在谜团之中，岛上乃至岛外的索特索特尔学者提出了许多理论。有人相信，伟大的海龟是“五化万”的铁壳“初之五”之子；“初之五”是一位被神化的始祖，索特索特尔也称其为“全皮”、“永生者”以及“不可死之物”。也有人认为，伟大的海龟可能是远古怪兽的后代——那些在“均衡”之前的时代里漫游大地的古老怪兽——或者它本身就是幸存的怪兽之一。龟类能够活很长时间，而这只生物温和的天性或许使它得以躲过巨龙神祇塔利尔与肆虐的怪兽之间的战争。还有一种理论认为，伟大的海龟是一位极其古老而强大的埃尔达蒙，并在物质世界中获得了具现之躯。

不论海龟起源的真相为何，对壳岛索特索特尔的日常生命更重要的，是海龟的习性与行为。岛民会在四季中绘制海龟穿行靛蓝之海的偏好航线，因为它会追随自己喜爱的食物——海藻与海草——而行。它们小心翼翼地将这些知识防范外人。对于任何希望离开岛屿、去交易那些无法在高山林地与半咸水红树林中生长的物资的居民而言，理解海龟的偏好至关重要。仅仅是为了探索周边世界，它们就必须对伟大的海龟的迁徙规律了如指掌——前提是它们希望在准备返回时，有很大机会尽快再次找到自己的家。

然而最近，出现了海龟行为反常的迹象。它是否在警惕某种新的威胁——其危险程度甚至足以令这等庞然巨物也为之戒备？它生病了吗？或许，它正在准备在有记录的历史中首次产卵？岛上的索特索特尔对这些可能性既焦虑又兴奋，因为其中任何一种，都可能帮助它们找到完美。

The Great Turtle

Designed by Chris McNulty, Seth Eddy, and Dylan Marriner

Shell Island is unique among all the isles in the Indigo Sea: the island, with all its plants, inhabitants, and natural features, has grown off the back of an enormous sea turtle with a large horn, a simple, peaceful entity that swims across the sea according to its own whims and fancies.

The island's inhabitants are xotlxotl, typically ironshell xotlxotl, who grow chelonian shells as a form of symbiosis. Many of these xotlxotl consider the Great Turtle a wise teacher who will show them the path to perfection if they can emulate the turtle's ways. The turtle isn't a sage who speaks to them and teaches them directly; instead, they learn by example from the turtle's actions and from its powerful but gentle nature. The island's xotlxotl raise giant snails to assist with waste management and serve as an occasional food source, and they dive underwater to gather the abundant shellfish that grow on the turtle's reeflike underside.

The turtle's origins are shrouded in mystery, and scholars among the island's xotlxotl population and beyond have many theories. Some believe that the Great Turtle is a child of First-of-Five, the Ironshell of the Five-who-became-Many, a deified progenitor that xotlxotl also calls the All-Skin, the Everliving, and That-Which-Cannot-Die. Others consider the possibility that the Great Turtle is a child of the ancient kaiju that roamed the land in the time before the Balance, or perhaps a surviving kaiju. Turtles can live a long time, and it's possible that the creature's gentle nature allowed it to escape the war between the dragon deity Talir and the rampaging kaiju. Then there's the theory that the Great Turtle is an extremely ancient and powerful eldamon that became embodied in the material world.

Whatever the truth of the turtle's origins, what's more important to the everyday life of the xotlxotl on Shell Island are its habits and behavior. Islanders map out the turtle's favorite routes through the Indigo Sea throughout the seasons, as it follows after its preferred meals algae and seaweed. They carefully guard that knowledge from outsiders. Understanding the turtle's predilections is essential to any inhabitant who wishes to leave the island to trade for goods that don't grow in elevated mountain groves and brackish mangroves. They need an intimate knowledge of the Great Turtle's migration patterns just to explore the surrounding world, assuming they want to have a good chance of finding their home again soon when they're ready to return.

Recently, however, there have been signs of the turtle acting strangely. Is it wary of some new threat dangerous enough for even a creature of its colossal size? Is it sick? Perhaps it is preparing to lay eggs for the first time in recorded history? The xotlxotl of the island are anxious and excited by the many possibilities, each of which might help them find perfection.

Shoalmyst Isle.name: 浅雾岛 Shoalmyst Isle
Shoalmyst Isle.text:
巨龙康复中心

设计：Robert Isaac

你听说过有些巨龙偶尔会施放的“lux aeterna”仪式吧？就是那个能改变它们、让它们在冒险之类的考验中迅速变得更强大的仪式？它对它们的改变相当大，而光是听起来就很危险。据说，这个仪式对大多数参与其中的巨龙都相当安全，甚至还能让它们从致命疾病或伤势中恢复。不过，在极其、极其罕见的情况下，事情会变得可怕地出错。既然据说安全，为什么还会这样？可能是随机的意外，可能是巨龙在研究与准备方面做得不够，也可能甚至是蓄意破坏的结果。无论如何，大多数把lux aeterna仪式搞砸的巨龙都设法成为幸存者，但它们的心智、身体、生命力与灵体都会变得不稳定。

这个世界对不稳定的巨龙并不安全；而如果它们的力量在心智仍旧不稳时向上波动，这个世界也不会因它们而安全。为此，永恒金巨龙Felaria Pyrathi在与世隔绝的Shoalmyst Isle上建立了一处独一无二的康复设施，致力于援助这些不幸的巨龙、研究它们，并希望有朝一日找到让它们完全康复的方法。据我所闻，Felaria痴迷于研究以治愈这种罕见苦难，可能还有她自己的秘密原因。倒不是说治愈者或研究者不可能纯粹出于利他而行动，但有传言称Felaria与这苦难有着更私人的联系：她本人就是一次失败的lux aeterna仪式的幸存者，症状尤其轻微，而她希望为自己和她的病患都找到疗法。但如果Felaria的苦难突然在Shoalmyst发作，会发生什么？

毕竟，只有Felaria理解岛上与设施中存在的诸多魔法，也只有她掌控那些安全措施。

Rehabilitation Center for Dragons

Designed by Robert Isaac

You've heard of the lux aeterna ritual dragons sometimes cast, right? The one that changes them so they can become more powerful quickly if they test themselves on adventures and the like? It changes them quite a bit, and it sure seems dangerous to hear about it. Supposedly, the ritual is quite safe for most dragons who engage in it, and it even allows them to recover from a terminal illness or injury. But very, very rarely, something goes horribly wrong. Why is that when the ritual is supposedly safe? It could be a random mishap, poor research and preparation on the part of the dragon, or even an act of intentional sabotage. Whatever the case, most dragons who botch the lux aeterna ritual manage to survive, but their minds, bodies, life forces, and spirits become unstable.

The world is not a safe place for unstable dragons, nor is the world safe from them if their power fluctuates upward while their mind is still unsteady. For this reason, the aeternal gold dragon Felaria Pyrathi established a one-of-a-kind rehabilitation facility on the isolated Shoalmyst Isle, dedicated to aiding these unfortunate dragons, studying them, and hoping to one day find a way to bring them full recovery. From what I've heard, there's a chance that Felaria has her own secret reason for her obsession with her research to heal this rare affliction. Not to say that it's impossible for a healer or researcher to act purely out of altruism, but there are rumors that Felaria has a more personal connection to the affliction: that she herself was a survivor of a failed lux aeterna ritual with particularly mild symptoms, and that she hopes to find a cure for herself as well as her patients. But what might happen on Shoalmyst if Felaria's affliction flares up suddenly?

After all, only Felaria understands the many magics present on the island and in the facility, and only she has control over the safety measures.

Silent Sanctuary.name: 寂静圣所 Silent Sanctuary
Silent Sanctuary.text:
虚空圣所

设计者 Dylan Tice-Carroll

寂静圣所岛是个宁静之地——宁静得过于反常，绝非自然形成。多亏了库乌的崇拜者施放的、名为“寂静圣所”的同名仪式所赋予的力量——库乌乃是晦涩难明的虚空神祇——在岛上，致命的攻击是不可能发生的。哪怕一滴血也无法在那里被流出。这一法术效果的某些副作用导致许多居民逃往其他岛屿或因饥饿而死。寂静圣所甚至不再有任何食肉动物，这让鸮鹦鹉以及其他通常可能易遭捕食的动物得以在此繁盛。对攻击性的禁止并不妨碍生物食用植物，也不会阻止某人食用在别处被杀死的生物之肉。

自该仪式创立以来，岛上的主要居民一直是库乌的神秘祭司，他们似乎正在追求某个未知目标。在群岛各处的酒馆里，人们窃窃私语，猜测那目标究竟是什么。就我个人而言，我赞同最流行的观点：这座岛上有某种极其危险之物，库乌派正在调查或遏制它。也许有头异界野兽以鲜血为食，借此从沉眠中苏醒；又或岛上的某个灵能造物会根据它所目睹的邪恶行径而扭曲变形。一切皆有可能涉及某个谜团，而库乌派正试图阻止其污秽的异界影响。

除库乌的崇拜者之外，零散的难民与其他寻求庇护者也为自保而来到此岛，形成了一个微小而和平的村落，将此地视为真正的圣所。他们采集果实、放牧免受掠食者威胁的牲畜，过着朴素而田园诗般的生活，远离库乌派可能正在对抗的任何恐怖。

然而，并非所有人都相信这仪式的目的在于对抗某种强大威胁。令人胆寒的奥尔波克海盗比洛斯坚信，库乌的崇拜者正用他们的魔法为一件强大的宝藏创造一种“天然金库”——一处无法以暴力攻破的坚不可摧的圣所。无论是被单纯的贪欲所驱使，还是被某种异界海妖之歌所引诱——那歌声由库乌派所恐惧的某物发出，意在搅动现状——比洛斯一直在训练他的海盗们掌握非致命的征服技巧，确信数量稀少的库乌派与村民绝无可能抵挡他那支老练的船员。对岛上居民而言值得庆幸的是，比洛斯的野心并未如他所愿那般隐秘，一些库乌的崇拜者注意到他的船员在岛上进行试验，以确定在该仪式的区域内哪些手段可行。为了防止岛屿被征服并避免某个巨大邪恶的潜在释放，这些一向沉默寡言、离群索居的虚空崇拜者一直在暗中联络愿意学习自身非致命技巧的冒险者，协助反击海盗并维持这处圣所。

Sanctum of the Void

Designed by Dylan Tice-Carroll

The island of Silent Sanctuary is a peaceful place—far too peaceful to be natural. Thanks to the power of an eponymous ritual known as silent sanctuary cast by worshippers of Kuu, the inscrutable deity of the void, lethal aggression is impossible on the island. Not a single drop of blood can be shed there. One of the side effects of the spell's effect caused many inhabitants to escape to other islands or die of starvation. Silent Sanctuary no longer even has any carnivorous animals present, allowing kakapos and other animals that might normally be vulnerable to predation to flourish there. The prohibition against aggression doesn't prevent a creature from eating plants, and it also doesn't stop someone from eating meat from a creature killed elsewhere.

Since the ritual's inception, the main residents of the island have been the mysterious priests of Kuu, who seem to be pursuing an unknown goal there. In taverns across the Isles, people whisper as to what that goal might be. Personally, I stand by the most popular opinion: that there's something extremely dangerous about the island that the Kuuites are investigating or containing. Perhaps an otherworldly beast feasts upon the blood to awaken from its slumber, or a psychic brainchild on the island twists and warps itself based on the wicked deeds it observes. There's every possibility that an Enigma is involved and that the Kuuites are attempting to stave off its foul, otherworldly influence.

In addition to the worshippers of Kuu, scattered refugees and others seeking asylum have come to the island for their own protection, forming a tiny, peaceful village that considers the place a true sanctuary. They gather fruit and herd animals safe from predators, living a simple and idyllic life, safe from whatever horror the Kuuites might be fighting.

However, not everyone believes that the purpose of the ritual was to combat a potent threat. The dread orpok pirate Biloth has become convinced that the worshippers of Kuu are using their magic to create a sort of natural vault for a powerful treasure—an impenetrable sanctum that can't be broken by violence. Whether lured by simple greed or some kind of alien siren song sent by whatever the Kuuites fear in order to help shake up the status quo, Biloth has been training his pirates in nonlethal techniques for conquest, certain that the small number of Kuuites and villagers stand no chance against his expert crew. Fortunately for the inhabitants, Biloth's ambitions haven't remained as well-hidden as he hoped, and some of the worshippers of Kuu noticed his crew experimenting on the island to determine what techniques would work within the ritual's area. In order to prevent the island's conquest and the potential release of a great evil, the normally taciturn and solitary worshippers of the void have been quietly reaching out to adventurers willing to learn nonlethal techniques of their own to help fight back the pirates and maintain the sanctuary.

Siren's Lament.name: 塞壬的挽歌 Siren's Lament
Siren's Lament.text:
翡翠地狱的幸存者

设计者 Carlos Caro

旅人，若你正在读这段文字，你可以叫我菲奥蕾拉。有人称我为恶魔中的叛逆者，一个寻求救赎之人。我冒着巨大的风险，历经艰难，才确保你能得到这份前往塞壬之哀的指引——那是一座充斥阴谋与秘密的岛屿。若说朗普兰克是一场永无止境的色彩与激情的狂欢，那么塞壬之哀便是一场面具舞会，掩藏着数十副面孔。有的面孔残忍而如怪物，有的高贵而令人振奋，有的被陌生的热情驱使而狂野，有的狡猾而工于算计。只要你愿意花点时间去观察，你就会发现：每一扇门后，都有一个在黑暗中藏匿的秘密。

“塞壬之哀”之名源自其外形，以及第一位为其绘制地图的制图师所讲的夸张故事——它看起来就像一位人鱼斜倚着，尾巴高高扬起。岛屿的“脊梁”在最高处上升至海平面以上约三千英尺，这些丘陵使信风在南侧倾泻雨水，形成被淹没的沼泽湿地。许多湍急而清澈的河流自群山流下，无路可循的丛林在岛屿内部蔓延。

在北方，一处非凡的天然港湾构成了塞壬湾——岛上最主要的聚居地。那是一座极佳的深水避风港，也是多种族裔的家园。岛屿的西北部主要开垦为农地，肥沃的土壤使这座岛出产令人愉悦的咖啡、甘蔗与兰花，清风中也因此弥漫着新鲜水果的香气。位于岛屿南部的星辉湾口与星辉湾，栖息着一种本土的微小生物，它们能发出生物荧光，使海浪泛起美丽的光。最后，在塞壬湾以西，塞壬岩俯瞰港口；而在岩顶，则坐落着翡翠地狱——一座被丛林夺回的废弃流放监狱殖民地。

如今的塞壬之哀相对平和，家家户户可以养育孩子，孩童也能在街上嬉戏，但它并非一直如此。塞壬之哀最初于5850之年由“顽固者矫治公司”建立殖民点时，其目的在于收容那些被其他社区认为太棘手或不方便处理的囚犯；其中许多人被社会称作“怪物”，而公司则以收取高额费用作为交换。为安置这些罪犯，公司建造了“塞壬哀号矫正所”——一头残酷的怪物，人们更熟知它的名字：翡翠地狱。从第一天起，此地便是腐败与折磨的巢穴；公司还建立了塞壬湾镇来为监狱提供支撑，以公司代币运转经济，并剥削工人。

不论好坏，这座监狱确实“成功”了——它以“把你想从社会中抹去的人送来这里”的地方而闻名。然而，在5871之年，翡翠地狱发生了唯一一次重大越狱（不包括典狱长们的敲诈勒索勾当）。在一连串离奇的误打误撞中，涉及一只恐爪龙、六磅走私火药、半瓶金色朗姆酒，以及一箱愤怒的蝎子，g'muyan罪犯“皮奇”波克布利与另外十五名罪犯一同逃脱。越狱前，这个迷人的小无赖组织起一个由狱警组成的小团伙，把奢侈品走私进翡翠地狱。令人意外的是，越狱之后，这个由狱警与逃犯组成的松散同盟仍在延续；他们不再把违禁品运进监狱，而是开始把违禁品运进塞壬湾——把公司不愿提供的那些“小东西”带给人们。久而久之，人人都认识某个“皮奇的伙伴”，塞壬湾也因此没有彻底落入公司的掌控之中。更令人意外的是，这个组织至今仍在，只是其角色显然已发生改变。

我真希望能说，是某些勇敢的灵魂终结了这座监狱。但讽刺的是，翡翠地狱败于自身的低效。资助它的金主们为他们的金币找到了更好的用处，而周边社区也为最棘手的囚犯找到了更好的解决办法。到5964之年，翡翠地狱已被遗弃。最后一任典狱长——鸣谢他——释放了所有囚犯；而囚犯们——也该鸣谢他们——并未对昔日的狱卒发起暴动。相反，囚犯与狱警一同在塞壬湾安顿下来。当然，昔日囚犯住进了新的棚屋；而我遗憾地说，其中不在少数的人确实又回到了旧路。然而让我欣慰——也应当让你欣慰，若你是我所期望的那类人——的是，大多数新近获释的罪犯加入了塞壬湾，从事诚实（或至少有生产性）的营生。“皮奇的伙伴”在这场转变中发挥了关键作用：他们协助谈判了《约定》——那套维系塞壬湾与塞壬之哀运转的非正式规则。

如今，这《约定》并不意味着塞壬湾就此归于宁静。一段时间里仍有流血与混沌：有人被杀，也有人复仇。然而，在最初那阵暴力的痉挛之后，《约定》开始结出果实，塞壬湾找到了新的常态。更重要的是，《约定》意味着昔日囚犯能找到工作，昔日狱警也能保持安全。它把走私者或海盗之船那种陆上也能运行的精神，作为框架用来稳定城市。

《约定》将囚犯们关于“组”的概念制度化。人人至少属于一个“组”。每个工作场所、每个街头帮派、每支冒险者队伍——全都是“组”。若你想在塞壬湾办成任何事，就必须在“组”之间周旋。“组”掌控资源、制定规则、影响决策。除却血亲之外，你的“组”便是你最关键的纽带。

例如，“拓荒者”组经营着岛上大部分农务；而失败又古怪的发明家则构成“以太飞行家”组。“组”的规模也各不相同：被称为“宁舟摆渡人”的神秘幽灵猎手拥有完整的总部与图书馆；而“假面密会”却只是半打身着戏服的理想主义者。与此同时，“埃斯图切翁”组充当塞壬湾的雇佣执法者，他们也会帮助其他“组”惩戒违规者——当然，要收取价格。

这座岛既有谜团也有阴谋，而对冒险者与其他有才能之人的需求永不止息。若你符合条件，当你抵达岛上时，或许会发现自己被一群想招募你的“组”团团围住；每个“组”都有各自的议程、任务与目标。若你是我希望会读到这份文字的人，我由衷希望你能帮助人们团结，而非撕裂彼此。若你愿意，也许你会来找到我。

曾经，我名为菲奥蕾拉·戈尔汉德。我是屠戮的女王，一名玛莉莉丝。我仍是玛莉莉丝，但如今我已自由。我已成为贾塔的勇士，并欢迎你来到这片家园——在这里，你也能获得救赎。亲爱的读者，若你正是我一直在寻找的那个人，我希望你能加入我的“组”——“破晓同盟”；在这里，牛头人、拟形怪、黏液怪、斯忒诺，甚至恶魔都会聚集一处，去创造他们在这世界上的位置。我们将携手，不再是怪物。

Survivors of the Emerald Hell

Designed by Carlos Caro

Traveler, if you are reading this, you can call me Fiorella. Some call me a renegade among demons, one who sought redemption. At significant risk and with difficulty, I have seen fit to ensure you acquire this guide to Siren's Lament, an island of conspiracies and secrets. If Rumplank is an unending riot of color and passion, Siren's Lament is a masquerade hiding dozens of faces. Some of those faces are cruel and monstrous, some noble and inspiring, some wild with strange passions, and some cunning and scheming. Spend a little time looking, and you will find that behind every door, there is a secret hiding in the dark.

Siren's Lament is named for its shape and a tall tale by the first cartographer to map it, as it resembles a merfolk reclining with their tail raised. The island's spine rises to around three thousand feet above sea level at its tallest point, and these hills cause the trade winds to dump rain on the south, creating flooded fens. Many swift and clear rivers flow from the mountains, with trackless jungles spreading across the inner island.

To the north, a phenomenal natural harbor serves Siren's Cove, the chief settlement on the island. It's a superb, deep, and sheltered harbor and home to a wide variety of ancestries. The northwest of the island is cleared mainly for agriculture, as rich soil blesses this island with delightful coffee, sugarcane, and orchids that grace the wind with the smell of fresh fruit. Starshine Inlet and Bay, on the island's southern portion, have a native species of tiny bioluminescent creatures that cause the waves to glow with a beautiful light. Finally, to the west of Siren's Cove, Siren's Rock overlooks the harbor, and atop the Rock can be found Emerald Hell, an abandoned prison colony reclaimed by the jungle.

Today, Siren's Lament is a relatively peaceful place where families can raise children and play in the streets, but it wasn't always so. When Siren's Lament was initially settled in the year 5850 by the Company for Correction of Incorrigibles, it was intended to house prisoners other communities found too difficult or inconvenient, many of whom society considered "monsters," in exchange for a sizable fee. To accommodate these criminals, the Company built the Siren's Wail House of Corrections, a cruel monstrosity better known by the name Emerald Hell. From the first day, the place was a den of corruption and torment, and the Company built the town of Siren's Cove to support the prison, running the economy on company scrip and exploiting their workers.

For better or worse, the prison was a success and was known as the place to send people who you wanted to make disappear from society. However, in 5871, the Emerald Hell suffered its only major escape (that wasn't a warden's extortion racket). Through strange misadventures involving a deinonychus, six pounds of smuggled gunpowder, half a bottle of Golden Rum, and a box full of angry scorpions, the g'muyan criminal "Peeky" Pok'booli escaped along with fifteen other criminals. Before his escape, this charming rascal had organized a small syndicate of guards to smuggle luxuries into the Emerald Hell. Surprisingly, even after their escape, this informal alliance of guards and escapees continued, and instead of running contraband into the prison, they started running contraband into Siren's Cove. All the little things that the Company didn't. Over time, everyone knew one of Peeky's Pals, and Siren's Cove escaped being completely under the Company's thumb. Surprisingly, the organization continues today, but its role has certainly changed.

I wish I could say some brave souls put a stop to the prison. But ironically, the Emerald Hell fell to its own inefficiency. The moneymen supporting it found better uses for their coin, and local communities found better solutions for their most troublesome prisoners. By 5964, the Emerald Hell had been abandoned. The last warden, to his credit, released all the prisoners, and the prisoners, to their credit, didn't revolt against their former jailers. Instead, inmates and guards settled into Siren's Cove together. Of course, the former prisoners settled into new shanties, and I am sorry to say that no small number of them did return to their former ways. Yet it heartens me—as it should you, if you're the kind of person I hope—to say that most of the newly freed convicts joined Siren's Cove to ply honest (or at least productive) trades. Peeky's Pals were instrumental in this change. They helped negotiate the Accord, the informal rules that keep Siren's Cove and Siren's Lament functioning.

Now, this Accord did not mean Siren's Cove settled into tranquility. There was bloodshed and chaos for some time. There were killings, and there were acts of revenge. However, after the first paroxysm of violence, the Accord began to bear fruit, and Siren's Cove found a new normal. Moreover, the Accord meant former prisoners could get work and former guards could remain safe. It took the spirit of a smuggler's or pirate's ship on land and used it as a frame to stabilize the city.

The Accord formalized the prisoner's idea of sets. Everyone belongs to at least one. Every workplace, every street gang, every adventuring party—all of them are sets. If you want anything done in Siren's Cove, you have to move through the sets. Sets command resources, makes rules, and influences decisions. Short of your kin, your set is your most crucial tie.

For instance, the Homesteaders set run much of the island's farming, while failed, eccentric inventors make up the Aether Aviators set. They range in size as well: the mysterious ghost hunters called the Tranquil Boatmen have an entire headquarters and library, while The Mascula Obscura are just a half-dozen costumed idealists. Meanwhile, the Estucheon set serve as Siren's Cove's for-hire law enforcement, and they help other sets punish violations, for a price.

The island is home to mysteries and conspiracies alike, and there's always a need for adventurers and others of talent. If you fit the bill, you might find yourself swarmed by sets hoping to recruit you when you reach the island, each with their own agendas, quests, and goals. If you're the type of person I hope will read this, I genuinely hope you will help bring people together rather than tear them apart. If so, perhaps you will come find me.

Once, my name was Fiorella Gorehand. I was a queen of slaughter, a marilith. A marilith I remain, but now I am free. I have become a champion of Jata, and I welcome you to the home where you, too, can be redeemed. Dear Reader, if you are the one I have been seeking, I hope you will join with my set, the Daybreak Fellowship, where minotaurs and mimics and slimes and sthenos and even demons gather to create their own place in this world. Together, we shall be monsters no more.

Slorgmire.name: 斯洛格米尔 Slorgmire
Slorgmire.text:
渗流沼泽

设计者 Robert Alfis

尽管其他岛屿也有作为其生态系统组成部分的大型沼泽，但在靛蓝群岛之中，唯有斯洛格泥沼整座岛屿本身就是一片巨大的沼泽，没有任何其他生物群系或环境特性。在那片沼泽里，各式各样、数量难以计数的软泥怪成群涌动，不断分裂成越来越多的个体、发生突变，并形成新的物种。甚至连岛屿渗出的土壤与显现的淤泥都含有软泥怪胶质生理结构的元素，使其呈海绵状、无定形，并有利于软泥怪的生长。

斯洛格泥沼唯一的有智居民，是少数黏液怪——它们的核已觉醒出更深层的智慧。这些黏液怪也属于斯洛格泥沼少数会欢迎访客、而不是试图吞噬他们并吸收其养分的生物。尽管危险重重，来访者依旧络绎不绝，因为在斯洛格泥沼发现的沉积物与软泥怪残留物十分独特，且作为炼金材料价值不菲。它们在研究各类炼金诱变剂时尤其著名。

另一些旅人则前来试图理解这座岛屿及其独特的生态：为什么岛上会有如此之多的软泥怪？它们如何形成新物种、进化并突变？有些探险者认为，这些软泥怪源于构成沼泽并促使其生长与变化的多种元素能量的混合。也有人提出更激进的理论：他们相信在岛屿深处的某处，存在着一个巨大而真正非凡的黏液怪之核，而这只远古黏液怪进化出一种方式，将自身与岛屿融为一体，化身为沼泽，并作为其后各代软泥怪的“亲代”。

偶尔，这座岛会经历构造活动，而且这种活动似乎随着时间推移而愈发频繁。地震可能使岛屿碎裂成块，将软泥怪连同岛体一并崩离，并被送往其他岛屿“移植”。其源头可能是深海之下的火山喷口，或是不稳定的元素能量；但如果这座岛确实与某只黏液怪合而为一，那么它也可能是在尝试以类似软泥怪分裂增殖的方式，扩大自身繁殖的射程。

The Oozing Swamp

Designed by Robert Alfis

While other islands have large swamps as part of their ecosystem, Slorgmire alone among the Indigo Isles is a single massive swamp with no other biomes or environmental features. Within that swamp, countless oozes of all varieties swarm, splitting into ever more specimens, mutating, and forming new species. Even the island's seeping soil and manifest muck contain elements of oozes' gelatinous physiology, making it spongy, amorphous, and conducive to ooze growth.

The only sapient inhabitants of Slorgmire are a small number of slimes whose nuclei have awakened to a deeper intellect. These slimes are also among the few creatures of Slorgmire who welcome visitors rather than seek to devour them and absorb their nutrients. Despite the dangers, visitors are still plentiful since the sediments and ooze residue found in Slorgmire are distinctive and valuable as alchemical ingredients. They're particularly notable for their use in studying various alchemical mutagens.

Other travelers come seeking to understand the island and its unique ecology. Why are there so many oozes on the island? How are they forming new species, evolving, and mutating? Some explorers believe they were formed by a mix of elemental energies that formed the swamp and spurred the oozes' growth and changes. Others have a more radical theory: they believe that somewhere deep in the island lies an enormous and truly remarkable slime nucleus and that this ancient slime evolved a way to merge itself into the island, embodying the swamp and serving as a parent to the various ooze generations that came after.

Occasionally, the island experiences tectonic activity, and that only seems to have increased over time. The quakes risk breaking off chunks of the island, oozes and all, and sending them off to be transplanted to other islands. The source could be the volcanic vents deep beneath the ocean or the unstable elemental energies, but if the island truly is one with a slime, it could also be attempting to increase the range of its reproduction in much the same way an ooze splits off to form more oozes.

Smulliver Isle.name: 斯穆利弗岛 Smulliver Isle
Smulliver Isle.text:
骑士与无赖之岛

设计者 Sadinar

靛蓝群岛隐藏着许多秘密，而令人沮丧的是，对群岛大多数居民来说，斯穆利弗岛的住民保留了数量惊人的秘密。在这座看似漫不经心的岛屿之中，存在着两个彼此交融、不断变化的希德宫廷。这些斯穆利弗的妖精住民将自己认定为骑士或无赖：骑士总是尽其所知说真话，而无赖则总是说谎。然而，从外表上完全无法区分骑士与无赖；并且由于他们与夏之神——大笑的旅人查基萨——在远古时打下的一场赌约，部分住民（每次都不相同）会随着每个季节的更迭而互换宫廷。其结果可能造成无穷无尽的混乱，甚至即便是有岛上熟人的回头客旅人，也未必能长久地知道该信任谁。

凡人访客常为寻求答案而来到斯穆利弗岛，因为希德住民知晓许多几乎不与他人分享的故事。但他们很快就会发现，每一个问题都要付出代价，而且必须以比黄金更玄奥、更珍贵的方式支付。举例来说，某次请求的代价可能是一声“爱情最后一息”的呢喃——这既难以取得，也可能令人心碎。这意味着聪明的访客必须设法在尽可能少提问的情况下获得他们想要的答案，而这往往需要巧妙周旋于宫廷之间，以免无赖的谎言将他们引入歧途。毕竟，既然骑士与无赖并肩和睦共处，几乎不可能在为时已晚之前判断一位住民的身份。

岛屿还有一项更为离奇的特性，已经诱陷了不止少数粗心的旅人。在与希德的骑士和无赖共享一餐或一杯之后，那些缺乏强大心智的人往往会发现自己被迫屈从于两座宫廷之一所遵循的同一套规则。某个生物会加入哪一座宫廷，取决于季节的反复无常与其自身本性，而非取决于主人的宫廷。若一个生物在这种影响下停留过久，它可能在岛上逗留得远超预期；等到它终于离开（如果它还能离开的话），会发现世界早已将它抛在身后。

最近，岛上发生了一些诡异而危险的事件。一群古怪的入侵者出现在岛上，并不知何故成功压制了宫廷的意志。所知甚少，因为不幸的是，无赖那些遮掩真相的报告模糊了人们对事件的理解。整座岛的民众都困惑到了极点，甚至连骑士也只知道：他们当中有人失踪了，而所有试图查明更多情况的希德至今无一成功。这些骄傲而古怪的妖精能否设法向凡人外来者伸出援手来解决他们的问题，还是他们独特的沟通习性将导致交流崩溃？

Island of Knights and Knaves

Designed by Sadinar

The Indigo Isles have many secrets, and, frustratingly, for most of the Isles' residents, the inhabitants of Smulliver Isle keep a disconcerting number of them. Within this nonchalant-looking island are two integrated and ever-changing courts of sidhe. These fey inhabitants of Smulliver identify as either knights, who always tell the truth to the best of their knowledge, or knaves, who always lie. However, nothing visually distinguishes knights from knaves, and due to an ancient wager they made with Chakisa the Laughing Traveler, the god of summer, some of the residents (different ones each time) switch courts with the turning of every season. The result can lead to endless confusion, and even a repeat traveler with acquaintances on the island won't necessarily know who to trust for long.

Mortal visitors often come to Smulliver Isle for answers, as the sidhe inhabitants know numerous stories shared with few others. But they quickly find that every question comes at a cost, which they must pay in terms more esoteric and precious than gold. For instance, one such request might be a whisper of love's last gasp, which would be challenging and potentially heartbreaking to procure. This means that clever visitors must find a way to get the answers they seek while asking as few questions as possible, and that often involves navigating the courts adroitly, lest the knaves' lies lead them astray. After all, given that knights and knaves live side by side in harmony, it is nearly impossible to determine a resident's identity until it's too late.

One more curious property of the island has ensnared more than a few unwary travelers. After sharing a meal or a drink with the sidhe knights and knaves, those who lack a powerful mind will often find themselves compelled to succumb to the same rules that one of the two courts follows. The court a creature joins is subject to the whims of the seasons and their own nature, rather than the court of their host. A creature who stays under this influence too long might remain on the island far longer than they intended, finding that the world has since passed them by, if they ever leave at all.

Something strange and dangerous has happened on the island recently. A peculiar group of invaders appeared on the island and somehow managed to overcome the will of the courts. Little is known as, unfortunately, the obfuscating reports of knaves have blurred the understanding of the incident. The entire populace is so utterly confused that even the knights don't know much more than that some among their number are missing and that none of the sidhe who have attempted to find out more have been successful thus far. Will these proud and eccentric fey manage to reach out to mortal outsiders to solve their problems, or will their communication idiosyncrasies lead to a breakdown?

Snowsong Isle.name: 雪歌岛 Snowsong Isle
Snowsong Isle.text:
火恶魔的冰封印

设计者 法师Z

靛蓝群岛拥有许多高耸入云的山峰，终年积雪覆盖；但雪歌岛却是少数几个能在低得多的海拔上见到这种高山气候，以及相应的高山植物与野生生物之地之一。在雪歌岛上，至少总会飘着些许雪花，这意味着天气在柔和的飘雪与呼啸的暴风雪之间来回波动——而在那暴风雪中，有些居民发誓他们曾听到真正的嚎叫声随风传来。

一片广袤的雪松森林覆盖了岛屿的大部分地区，河流从岛上最大的湖泊——霜暮湖——流出，穿过仅有的几片平原。霜暮湖及其分支河流几乎终年冻结，但水仍在冰层下方深处流淌，并孕育着群岛中最稀有、也最美味的一些鱼类。至于陆地本身，尽管这里是寒带气候，且有通常只生长在高海拔的雪松存在，岛上地势却大多平坦，只在各处零星起伏着些许小丘。在岛屿中央、靠近冻结的湖泊处，有一座巨大的陨坑，数条峡谷如同陆地裂纹织成的蛛网般自其中分岔延伸。而在陨坑的中心，则坐落着神秘的嚎叫洞窟。尽管洞窟中蕴藏着珍贵的冰晶，仍很少有岛民尝试这段跋涉，而能返回者更是寥寥无几。

岛上的大多数居民居住在小镇雪花镇，主要由位于岛屿西南边缘的木屋组成。那里渔获丰饶，人们热情好客，食物也美味到让人们有时会专程扬帆前往雪歌岛只为一尝其味。根据开拓家族代代相传的传奇，小镇的创立者曾与一种名为“芬瑞斯”的稀有而强大的冰灵兽订立契约，将一种危险的炽热威胁囚禁起来——在传奇中它仅被称作“火恶魔”。作为永恒忠诚的守护者，古老的芬瑞斯创造了永不止息的极地天气，并在大地中嵌入巨大的冰晶，将整座岛变为那野兽的永久牢狱。故事真假与否无从得知，但传奇称每一代开拓家族都会派出继承人前去查看洞窟，以确保冰封印未被破坏，并与芬瑞斯重立誓约。然而，他们上一次派去查看洞窟与芬瑞斯的继承人再也没有回来。经过多番讨论，家族决定将他们的秘密分享给勇敢的冒险者，愿意查明失踪继承人的命运，并评估嚎叫洞窟当前的状况。

Icy Seal of the Fire Fiend

Designed by Z the mage

While the Indigo Isles are home to numerous mountain peaks so high that snow covers them year-round, Snowsong Isle is one of the few places to find that alpine climate and alpine plants and wildlife at much lower elevations. On Snowsong Isle, it's always snowing at least a little, meaning that the weather fluctuates between a gentle flurry and a howling blizzard—a blizzard from which some residents swear they've heard the sound of literal howling carried in the wind.

A vast cedar forest covers most of the island, with rivers flowing through the few plains from Frostrime Lake, the largest lake on the island. Frostrime and its branching rivers are almost always frozen year-round, but the water still flows deep below the top layers of ice and is home to some of the rarest and tastiest fish in the Isles. As for the land itself, despite the boreal climate and the presence of cedar, which generally only grows at high altitudes, the island is mostly flat, with minor hills here and there. In the center of the island, near the frozen lake, lies a vast crater with several canyons splitting off from it like a spiderweb of cracks in the land. And in the center of the crater lies the mysterious Howling Cave. While the cavern is home to valuable ice crystals, few of the island's inhabitants attempt the trek, and fewer still return.

Most of the island's populace lives in the small town of Snowflake, composed mainly of cabins on the island's southwestern edge. The fishing there is plentiful, the people there are welcoming, and the food is delicious enough that people sometimes set sail for Snowsong just to taste it. According to legends passed down by the town's founding family, the town's founder made a pact with a rare and powerful ice eldamon known as a "fenrice" to imprison a dangerous fiery threat known only in the legends as "The Fire Fiend." An eternally loyal guardian, the ancient fenrice created the everlasting arctic weather and the massive ice crystals embedded into the land, transforming the island into an eternal prison for the beast. Whether the story is true or not, legend has it that each generation, the town's founding family sends their heir to check on the cavern to ensure that the ice seal remains unbroken and to renew the oath with the fenrice. However, the last heir they sent to check on the cave and on fenrice never returned. After much discussion, the family has decided to share their secrets with brave adventurers willing to determine the fate of the missing heir and assess the current state of the Howling Cave.

Straid's Cay.name: 斯特雷德礁岛 Straid's Cay
Straid's Cay.text:
失落之岛

设计 Carolyn Tornatore

在靛蓝群岛有这么一个地方，遗失之物可以被找回。听起来很棒，对吧？别高兴得太早。这并不总是好事。许多东西之所以遗失，是有原因的。

在斯特雷德礁岛上，你能找到各种在群岛其他地方——有时甚至更远的地方——遗失的东西。我说的不只是物体。生命、理想、梦境，甚至地点，都可能在斯特雷德礁岛上失而复得。冒险者如虫群般涌向此处。和你一样，他们一听说这座岛屿的独特性质，就无视其中的含义，直奔而去，寻找失落的神器和宝藏。他们可没有我来把话说明白。你算走运。失落之岛是为失落者而存在的，所以大多数探险者在岛上的危险中迷失自我，或许也算恰如其分。

我们对这座岛屿的大部分了解，来自那些幸运地获得成功并返乡讲述经历的冒险者。除了失落者的幽影、残存与回响之外，岛上还栖息着一个名为“看守者”的克拉格拉克社群；他们同时崇拜“平衡”与“艾尔德”，并试图维持岛内失与得之间的均衡。看守者并不掌控岛屿的神秘机能。不过，他们更了解其中的运作方式，这很可能让他们发现了如何以某些更安全、更健康的方式影响这片离奇魔法生态系统中的岛屿。

幸存的冒险者称这座岛屿像是从别处拼凑而成的地点大杂烩；在看守者口中，这些地点被称为“失落之地”。岛屿会在两个不同且截然有别的失落之地之间立刻、突兀地切换；或是先短暂回归岛屿天然的热带气候一段时间，然后再过渡到另一处失落之地。在单一的失落之地中，与该地点相符的物体与生物出现的概率会略高一些，但进入一处失落之地，却遭遇到在别处遗失的实体与物体，也并不罕见。

你还想去参观吗？我已经尽力警告你了。希望你会是那些幸运儿之一。

Isle of the Lost

Designed by Carolyn Tornatore

There's a place in the Indigo Isles where lost things can be found. It sounds wonderful, doesn't it? Don't get ahead of yourself. That's not always a good thing. Many things were lost for a reason.

On the island of Straid's Cay, you can find all sorts of things that were lost elsewhere in the isles—and sometimes beyond. I'm not just talking about objects, though. Lives, ideals, dreams, and even places can be lost and found on Straid's Cay. Adventurers swarm the place. Like you, as soon as they heard about the island's unique properties, they ignored the implications and went charging off in search of lost artifacts and treasures. They didn't have me to set things straight. Lucky for you. The Isle of the Lost is meant for the lost, so perhaps it's only fitting that most explorers lose themselves to the island's dangers.

Much of what we know about the island comes from those fortunate adventurers who meet with success and return to tell the tale. Aside from specters, remnants, and echoes of the lost, the island is home to a kragrak community known as the Caretakers, who worship both the Balance and the Eld and seek to maintain a balance of lost and found within the island. The Caretakers don't control the island's mystical functions. Still, they know more about how things work, which likely allowed them to discover how to influence the island in certain safer and healthier ways for its bizarre magical ecosystem.

The surviving adventurers describe the island as a mishmash of locations taken from elsewhere, known to the Caretakers as "Lost Places," either in an immediate and sudden shift between two different and distinct Lost Places or with a return to the island's natural tropical climate for a time before transitioning into another Lost Place. Within a single Lost Place, objects and creatures that match the location are slightly more likely, but it's not unusual to enter a Lost Place only to encounter entities and objects lost elsewhere.

Are you still interested in visiting? I did my best to warn you. Hopefully, you'll be one of the lucky ones.

Tidepool Key.name: 潮池钥匙 Tidepool Key
Tidepool Key.text:
被潮汐吞没的岛屿

设计：Todd Ross

即使你航行到靛蓝海中恰到好处的位置，如果你在错误的时间到来，也不会在那里找到潮潭礁。正如其名，这座小岛海拔极低，高潮来临时海水会将它整个吞没。但当潮水退去时，回落的水面会显露出潮潭礁。这里朴实无华，主要由沙地构成，当然还有潮池，螃蟹与其他小型生物在其中安家。岛上无法维持任何不能每天被浪涛掩埋仍能存活的事物。尽管有少数坚韧的草类，其根系强壮到不至于被浪冲走，且可在水下存活长达一周，但海水早已侵蚀掉土壤。因此，当地唯一的植物群落便是海藻与其他生活在潮池中的水栖植物。

让潮潭礁值得关注的唯一事物，是一套从岛屿最高点开口的复杂海蚀洞系统——一座庞大的地城复合体，充满了珍贵的材料、罕见的危害，以及危险的生物，其中大多为两栖。潮水上涨时，水会涌入洞穴系统的入口。上涨的水位会封闭地城的一些通道，并开启新的路线。潮水回落时，大部分水又会排回海中，使洞穴恢复到较为干燥的状态。对你这样的陆栖者来说，深入潮潭礁是一场与时间的赛跑，因为如果你贪心而逗留过久就可能溺亡；即便你带着水下呼吸的魔法，在水下战斗也会处于劣势。然而，对像我这样的chochori而言，地城的两个相位并不造成不便；它们只是改变可用的路径与怪物遭遇的类型。你大概不意外，这座地城最受两栖冒险者欢迎；但如果你擅长掌握时间并愿意迎接挑战，你仍然可以试试看！

Island Swallowed by the Tides

Designed by Todd Ross

Even if you sail to just the right place in the Indigo Sea, you won't find Tidepool Key there if you come at the wrong time. True to its name, this tiny island has such a low elevation that the sea swallows it whole when high tide comes in. But when the tide is low, the receding waters reveal Tidepool Key. It's a humble place, mainly composed of sand and, of course, tidepools where crabs and other small creatures make their home. The island can't sustain anything that wouldn't survive being buried beneath the waves every day. While a few hardy grasses exist with roots strong enough not to be swept away by the waves, and they could survive underwater for up to a week, the sea has long since eroded the soil. Thus, the only local flora are seaweed and other aquatic plants living in the tidepools.

The one thing that makes Tidepool Key worthy of attention is the complex system of sea caves that opens from the island's highest point, a massive dungeon complex filled with valuable materials, unusual hazards, and dangerous creatures, most of which are amphibious. When the tide rises, water floods into the cave system's mouths. The rising water level closes up some of the dungeon's paths and opens up new ones. When the tide recedes, much of the water drains back into the sea, returning the caves to their drier state. For land-dwellers like you, delving into Tidepool Key is a race against time since you could drown if you get greedy and stay too long, and even if you bring water-breathing magic, you fight at a disadvantage underwater. However, for chochori like me, the two phases of the dungeon are no inconvenience; they simply change the available paths and the types of monster encounters. You're probably not surprised that the dungeon is most popular with amphibious adventurers, but if you're good at keeping track of time and up to the challenge, you could still give it a try!

Two Side.name: 双面 Two Side
Two Side.text:
光亮与黑暗之岛

设计者 Juniper Scott

两面岛之名源自贯穿岛屿中央的天牙山脉，它将岛屿分割为两种截然不同的生物群系。东部被称为夜面，海洋季风将云层推向天牙山脉，迫使其凝结为漆黑的暴风云，令岛屿半边长期笼罩在恒久的黑暗之中。此效果在山脉以西形成雨影，使那半边岛屿——被称为日面——成为干旱荒原。白天时天空无云，夜晚则有月光与星光映照在山脉的白色岩石上，因此日面在大多数时间里都被明亮光照所笼罩。

仅靠自身，两面岛的两半都不适宜生命生存；但两面岛的人们在富有创意的命名习惯上有所欠缺，却以对以物易物与贸易的精通远远弥补。日面酷热的烈日与贫瘠缺养的土壤会让大多数外来植物枯萎死亡，而本地的动植物往往有毒、食肉，或两者兼具。唯一的例外是辉光茎：一种白色植物，开有宽大的花朵，散发出类似阳光的辉光，并大量生长。夜面居民用辉光茎的花朵照亮城镇、驱赶致命掠食者、使牲畜温顺，甚至用来种植依赖光照的作物。因此，岛民以日面的辉光茎交换夜面的农产品与动物制品。

夜面的环境也并非没有其独特的植物群。水藏柏树已适应在缺乏阳光时利用闪电打击获取能量以生长。这些树生长迅速，但必须储存大量的水才能在闪电打击带来的高温中存活，这既赋予其名称，也使其非常适合与干涸的日面进行贸易。夜面人将整段水藏木树干运往日面的居民手中，后者从树中凿孔取水并压榨以获得淡水。即便在日面烈日的严酷热度下，一棵树也能储存数千加仑可饮用的水，持续超过一年。一旦水藏木被抽取至干涸，就会被锯成木板，以盐与油处理，并在阳光下进一步风干。这使木材变得极为耐水，非常适合在夜面那片雨水浸透的土地上用于建造。

于是，一个平衡的贸易体系得以维持。对两面岛的人而言，公平交易不仅是一种生活方式；它更是生存所必需。那些企图以失衡交易欺骗他人的人会被视为最卑劣的罪犯之一，而民间常有一句谚语：“骗走他人的今天，就是骗走你的明天。”

两面岛上有两处主要聚居地。夜面东海岸有长栈镇，因一条从镇上穿过海岸森林、延伸入靛蓝海较为平静水域的长栈道而得名。日面西海岸则坐落着盐湾镇，得名于海湾岸边多由海水蒸发后留下的盐所构成。不久之前，日面在天牙山脉脚下建立了一处新聚居地，名为越岭镇。人们希望能在两面之间建立一条新的贸易路线，翻越山脉而非绕岛航行。不幸的是，东部持续不断的风暴使行程对夜面居民而言过于凶险，这项事业最终被放弃。这引发了越岭镇居民日益增长的怨恨；他们如今感到与赖以生存的可靠贸易路线隔绝。甚至有人开始散布谣言，称夜面故意误导了这条贸易路线的可行性，以令日面处于不利地位。这些谣言是假的，但当你又热、又渴、又愤怒时，它们就很容易令人相信。

Island of Light and Darkness

Designed by Juniper Scott

The island of Two Side gets its name from the Skyfang Mountains that run down the middle of the island and divide it into two different biomes. To the east, known as the Night Side, ocean winds push clouds up against the Skyfang Mountains, causing them to form pitch-black storm clouds that blanket half of the island in constant darkness. This effect creates a rain shadow to the west of the mountains, causing that half of the island, known as the Day Side, to be an arid wasteland. Without a cloud in the sky during the day and with moonlight and starlight reflecting off the white stone of the mountains at night, Day Side is cast in bright light much of the time.

On their own, both halves of Two Side would be inhospitable to life, but what the people of Two Side lack in creative naming conventions, they more than make up for with their mastery of barter and trade. Most outside plants wither and die in the sweltering sun and nutrient-deprived soil of Day Side, and the native flora and fauna tend to be toxic, carnivorous, or both. The one exception is glowstalk, a white plant with a wide flower that gives off a glow similar to sunlight and grows in abundance. The people of Night Side use glowstalk flowers to light their towns, ward off deadly predators, keep livestock docile, and even grow crops that rely on light. Thus, the islanders trade glowstalks from Day Side for produce and animal goods from Night Side.

The environment of Night Side is not without its own unique plant life. The waterlog cypress tree has adapted to harness lightning strikes for energy to grow in the absence of sunlight. These trees grow rapidly, but they must retain large quantities of water to survive the heat from the lightning strikes, which both gives the tree its name and makes it perfect for trade with the desiccated Day Side. Night Siders ship whole trunks of waterlog to the people of Day Side, who tap and press the trees for fresh water. A single tree can retain thousands of gallons of drinkable water for over a year, even in the harsh heat of the Day Side sun. Once a waterlog tree has been tapped dry, it's cut into planks, treated with salt and oil, and further dried out in the sun. This causes the wood to become highly water-resistant, making it perfect for construction in the rain-soaked land of Night Side.

And so, a system of balanced trade is sustained. For the people of Two Side, a fair trade isn't just a way of life; it's imperative to their survival. Those who would cheat others with a lopsided trade are viewed as being some of the lowest of criminals, and a common proverb among the people is "to swindle someone's today is to swindle your tomorrow."

There are two main settlements on Two Side. On the east coast of Night Side, there is the town of Long Dock, so named for the long dock that stretches from the town deep in the coastal forest out into the less turbulent waters of the Indigo Sea. On the west coast of Day Side lies the town of Salt Bay, so named because the bay's shores consist mostly of salt from evaporated sea water. Not long ago, a new settlement was founded on Day Side at the foot of the Skyfang Mountains called Up and Over. The hope was that a new trade route could be established between the two sides that would go over the mountains as opposed to sailing around the island. Unfortunately, the constant storms to the east caused the trek to be too treacherous for the people of Night Side, and the venture was eventually abandoned. This has caused growing resentment among the people of Up and Over, who now feel isolated from the reliable trade routes they need to survive. Some have even begun to spread rumors that Night Side intentionally misled the viability of such a trade route to put Day Side at a disadvantage. These rumors are false, but they're easy to believe when you're hot, thirsty, and angry.

Wa'altopia.name: 瓦尔托匹亚 Wa'altopia
Wa'altopia.text:
阿拉卡最欢乐的地方

设计者 Adam Shimp

瓦阿莉·滕迪斯是一位g'mayun巫妖，她似乎从未在任何邪恶阴谋上成功过。厌倦了自己从来不被臆想中的对手与活之诸国认真对待，她召起一支亡灵大军，试图征服一个大型大陆国家。这次尝试同样以凄惨的失败告终，但终于为她赢得了她一直渴望的那种恶名。不幸的是，事实证明这与她想象的完全不同。

在她隐藏的命匣附近复生后，她头上还悬着一笔巨额悬赏，瓦阿尔妮意识到，被无数冒险者追猎并不是她喜欢的事。或许当她能安静地进行那些存疑的伦理实验时，生命更美好。但她的动作已永远夺走了她重新隐姓埋名的选择。当她与她的副官们将逃离这场自作自受的困境的选项逐一缩小范围时，他们排除了除两个之外的所有方案。其中一个是极其合理且务实的策略：伪造瓦阿莉的毁灭，连同假的命匣一起。

命运弄人，那一天他们并没有选择这个计划。于是，瓦阿托邦诞生了：瓦阿尔妮命令她的爪牙将靛蓝群岛中那座隐秘的岛屿要塞巢穴变形成一处海岛度假与度假村，并将其命名为“阿拉卡最欢乐的地方”。她把岛屿划分为多个主题区域，每个区域由她最顶尖的四位副官之一监管，并由合适的爪牙担任娱乐人员。例如在“惊悚托邦”，他们经营恐怖主题景点，设有墓园、闹鬼屋与幽灵（特征）之旅，并由亡灵担任工作人员。

不言而喻，最初构想的瓦阿托邦，是一层烟幕，用来保护巫妖不被横冲直撞的冒险者摧毁。瓦阿尔妮退回她的实验室继续实验，只是大致关注每月报告，并与副官们协调。但某一天，在一次会议上她听到了一个让她吃惊的数额——那笔钱足以令她更认真地留意——而她发现的事情令她震撼。

不知怎的，这座度假村成了极受欢迎的度假胜地，其盈利甚至远超她以往任何邪恶阴谋。她赚到足够多的钱，将研究推进到全新的高度。没人确定她在几十年来恐吓他人屡屡失败之后，却在取悦人群方面获得成功时作何感想；但在过去的几年里，她一直没有走出实验室，把度假村完全交给副官们自行运营。到目前为止，运作依旧如常，但我听说有传言称，瓦阿莉的一些手下怀念“旧日好时光”。事情会继续顺利下去吗？还是说，阿拉卡最欢乐的地方将变成一场血腥浩劫——巫妖的爪牙派系冲突四起，而毫不知情的客人被卷入交火之中？

The Cheeriest Place on Alacar

Designed by Adam Shimp

Wa'aly Tendis was a g'mayun lich who never seemed to succeed at any of her evil schemes. Tired of how she was never taken seriously by her imagined rivals and the nations of the living, she raised an undead army in an attempt to conquer a large mainland nation. This attempt, too, was a miserable failure, but it finally earned her the kind of notoriety she had sought. Unfortunately, it turned out to be nothing like she had imagined.

After rejuvenating near her hidden phylactery with a massive bounty on her head, Wa'alny realized that being hunted down by countless adventurers wasn't something she enjoyed. Maybe life was better when she could perform her dubiously ethical experiments in peace. But her actions had stolen the option of obscurity from herself forever. When she and her lieutenants narrowed down her choices to escape her self-inflicted dilemma, they eliminated all the options except two. One was an extremely reasonable and practical strategy in which they faked Wa'aly's destruction, false phylactery included.

As fate would have it, that was not the plan they chose that day. Thus Wa'altopia was born, as Wa'alny had her minions transform her hidden island fortress lair in the Indigo Isles into an island getaway and resort, which she dubbed "The Cheeriest Place on Alacar." She split up the island into themed areas, each overseen by one of her top four lieutenants, with appropriate minions serving as entertainment. For instance, in Spookytopia, they run horror-themed attractions with graveyards, haunted houses, and ghost tours staffed by the undead.

Needless to say, Wa'altopia, as it was first conceived, was a smokescreen to protect the lich from being destroyed by rampaging adventurers. Wa'alny retreated to her laboratory to continue her experiments, coordinating with her lieutenants as she vaguely paid attention to the monthly reports. But one day, she heard an amount of money at one of those meetings that startled her enough to pay closer attention, and what she discovered astounded her.

Somehow, the resort had become an extremely popular vacation destination and much more profitable than her evil schemes had ever been. She was making enough money to take her research to new heights. No one's sure how she felt about succeeding at entertaining people after failing for decades to terrorize them, but she hasn't emerged from her laboratory for the last few years, leaving the lieutenants to run the resort on their own. Thus far, the operations have continued apace, but I've heard rumors that some of Wa'aly's underlings long for the "good old days." Will things continue smoothly, or will the Cheeriest Place on Alacar become a bloodbath of factional conflict between the lich's minions and the unwitting guests caught in the crossfire?

Whisperstar Isle.name: 低语星岛 Whisperstar Isle
Whisperstar Isle.text:
异界存在的结晶化遗骸

设计者 Rogelio Gaona

低语星岛是个诡异而恐怖的地方，几乎没有什么能被确凿知晓。最全面的描述来自雅科维乌斯的著述——一位“行走之蠕虫”，其一生志业便是寻找并研究这座神秘岛屿。雅科维乌斯的文字将该岛描绘为一具来自现实之外存在的庞大尸骸：当其穿过帷幕进入我们的现实之时，便结晶化为沉积物。该岛会在靛蓝海的不同地点出现，而且只在特定的时代窗口中现身，仿佛永远被困在我们的现实与其他现实之间。

这头巨大的生物曾在其广袤的躯体上分布着四颗心脏，而它们后来结晶化为名为虚空之心的奇物。这些心脏能保护持有者免受时代的摧残，并赐予怪异的力量，但代价极其高昂。在岛屿中心的虚空陨坑之北、南、东、西四方，强大的存在夺取了这些虚空之心，并以其力量建立了各自的封地。雅科维乌斯如此描述它们：

岛屿北部是巨型的诡异自动机马莱德纳尔的领域。马莱德纳尔曾非常喜爱布偶与其他低等的智能构装体，并试图为它们建立一处庇护所；但在马莱德纳尔金属胸腔中跳动的那颗虚空之心，此后却将它扭曲了。

东方则是施虐的小丑巨龙弄臣墨丘提娅那异想天开的游乐场。她以残酷恶作剧为伎俩，揭露即便最显高尚的来访者内心也潜藏的黑暗。依雅科维乌斯所言，墨丘提娅曾寻求一位真正的英雄，但在测试每一位候选者时，她都因其不可避免的缺陷而愈发幻灭。

在岛屿南部，一名名为奥格拉多的班诺格在他建造的一座古怪天文台中做着末日般的梦境。他相信有某个存在选中了他，并为了某个关键目的将这些梦境送来。雅科维乌斯推测，这个存在或许是一位“谜”或其仆从之一。

最后，岛屿西侧被奇异且看似随机的魔法效果所覆盖——这要归功于哈德里根的源泉法师艾尔芬，她在此照料自己由植物与法术构成的致命花园。那些挺过狂野魔法的人，仍可能倒在被弥漫魔法染色的曼德拉草与莱希的手中。

这四颗心脏以及栖居于这些地区的群体如何彼此交互，仍是雅科维乌斯需要厘清之事，因为他们从未能在岛上停留足够久以探明真相。即便如雅科维乌斯这般强大的存在，也害怕在岛屿进行跨维度漫游时逗留其上——他们无法确定自己会遭遇何事，或将被如何改变。雅科维乌斯写道：每当整座岛屿消失之前，位于岛屿中心的诡异虚空陨坑总会先以黑暗能量脉动；而那也是雅科维乌斯离开岛屿、并在其未来某日再度现身后开始搜寻其新位置的信号。

Crystallized Corpse of an Otherworldly Being

Designed by Rogelio Gaona

Whisperstar Isle is a strange and terrifying place, with little known for sure. The most comprehensive description comes from the writings of Yacovius, a worm that walks, who has made it their life's work to find and study this mysterious island. Yacovius's writings describe the island as the colossal corpse of a being from outside our reality that crystallized into sediment when it passed through the veil into our reality. The island appears in different places in the Indigo Sea and only for a particular window in time, stuck seemingly forever between our reality and others.

The enormous creature once had four hearts across its vast body, which have since crystallized into artifacts called Void Hearts. These hearts protect the owner from the ravages of time and grant strange powers, but they come at a great cost. To the north, south, east, and west of the Void Crater at the island's center, powerful entities have seized the Void Hearts and built fiefdoms with their power. Yacovius describes them as follows:

The island's north is the domain of the gargantuan eldritch automaton Malednar. Malednar was a big fan of poppets and other inferior intelligent constructs, and he tried to make a sanctuary for them, but the Void Heart that beats inside Malednar's metal chest has since twisted it.

To the east is the whimsical playground of the sadistic harlequin dragon jester Mercutia. She uses cruel pranks as a ploy to expose the darkness inside even the noblest-seeming visitors. According to Yacovius, Mercutia once sought a true hero, but she grew disillusioned by the inevitable failings of each candidate she tested.

In the south of the island, a bannog named Orgrado dreams apocalyptic dreams in a strange observatory he's built. He believes an entity has chosen him and sent him these dreams for a crucial purpose. Yacovius speculates that this being might be an Enigma or one of their servants.

Lastly, the island's west side is covered by strange and seemingly random magical effects, courtesy of the hardriggan wellspring mage Elphene, who tends to her deadly gardens of plants and spells. Those who withstand the wild magic might fall to the mandragoras and leshies dyed by the pervasive magic.

How these four hearts and the groups that inhabit these regions interact with one another is something Yacovius still needs to determine, as they have never managed to stay on the island long enough to determine the truth. Even a being as powerful as Yacovius is frightened to stay on the island during one of its cross-dimensional jaunts, unsure of what might happen to them or how they might be changed. Yacovius writes that the strange Void Crater in the island's center always pulses with dark energy just before the entire island disappears, and that is also Yacovius's cue to leave the island and begin their search for its new location once it someday reappears.

Dragons of the Indigo Isles.name: 靛蓝群岛的巨龙 Dragons of the Indigo Isles
靛蓝群岛的巨龙 Dragons of the Indigo Isles
Dragons of the Indigo Isles.text:
永恒贤者卡利赞德雷克斯就此主题所作的一份简短而谦逊的册页。

欢迎来到我这番最富启迪的副业探索，哦，品味高雅的读者。当你阅读那些比我平日对“永恒之光”仪式的深度钻研所会让你预期到的、更加偏传统派的巨龙时，或许会惊喜地发现你这位卑微作者——永恒贤者卡利赞德雷克斯——所做的细致工作。你很好奇，是吗？若你尚未听闻或读到那席卷世界、让年轻巨龙在短短数年内便能踏上冒险并发挥全部潜能的“永恒之光”仪式，你就必须阅读我详尽的研究成果——《巨龙与永恒之光仪式》（或者，出于某些凡俗得可笑的缘由，一些凡人开始把它称作《Battlezoo Ancestries: Dragons》）。不过我扯远了。

万事皆有极佳的解释，我这反常主题亦然；为讲述那段故事，我从自己亲身寻访靛蓝群岛及更远之地的强大野生巨龙的见闻中，汇集了若干片段，你将在我这份最受尊崇的手稿中见到它们。

正是那些靛蓝群岛——你毫无疑问已从商人与旅人那里听过诸多详述……至少，除非你把脑袋深深卡进某个上锁的守护宝库里，以至于别人会把你误认为一条青铜巨龙：永远停滞不前，远离最新资讯，对一线情报一无所知。

我得承认，靛蓝群岛那种整体氛围，并非我平日会迫不及待想造访之处。尽管如此，利大于弊，于是，在一次命定的远征中，你这卑微作者便启程了！

“但为什么？”你又问道——任何有鉴别力的读者都该如此。我必须追查我少数同侪之一在一封罕见通信中提到的数条线索，内容关乎：为何在野生巨龙谱系之中，永恒巨龙如此普遍。

此观察放之四海而皆准，但在靛蓝群岛尤为明显；此外，该群岛所栖居的野生巨龙也比多数其他地区更多。

时机恰好堪称天赐。随着本十年“巨龙霸王”竞赛的新晋优胜者正打算探究世界上隐藏的巨龙，我只需在提案中补上几笔，表明我将寻找那些我们鲜少研究过的巨龙情报——例如海市蜃楼巨龙、恶作剧巨龙，甚至末日巨龙。无论成败，如此调整研究提案便打开了资助之门，为我提供经费，使我得以探索自己真正感兴趣的课题。当然，如今或许有必要在未来某个日期再撰写一份手稿，专门详述那些其他巨龙；但对如我这般的学者而言，更多写作与更深学识又怎会是负担。

就这样，手握关键经费，我扬帆前往靛蓝群岛，亲自寻求这些问题与更多问题的答案。诚然，向当地通晓此道之人提问更为便利；但谈到实地工作，若想把事办对，就得亲力亲为。否则，你永远无法真正确定自己挖掘到的信息究竟准确无误，还是经由二手、三手流转而逐渐失真，直至对严肃研究者而言几乎毫无用处。

那么，这篇序言是在向你们——我忠实的读者——致歉，因为接下来的篇幅将讨论传统派野生巨龙吗？不，我绝不会为卓越道歉，哪怕它与我最炽热的研究主题稍有偏离。相反，它提供的是解释，并且某种意义上也是我旅程的引子；你可以通过寻找带有我印玺、以示其为第一手真源的书信来追溯这段旅途。

野生巨龙谱系

铺垫至此，且让我们直入主题要害——尽管其中关于“永恒之光”启示的内容可能不多：野生巨龙，一个虽非靛蓝群岛所独有，却在那同一片群岛中远比其他地方更常见的谱系。

当你观察一群野生巨龙时（当然，是相对于其他谱系的诸多威严巨龙而言），你最先注意到的，或许是它们往往覆满神秘的纹描——其色泽与它们本名所指的鳞色迥异的图案。这些纹描对所有野生巨龙都具有明确且关键的作用：作为将魔法能量贯通全身的渠道，一套魔法循环系统，正如世界本身借助地脉线运作一般。通过细致研究这些图案的色调、鲜艳度与形态，你能判断野生巨龙的魔法通路之诸多信息。确实，传统派野生巨龙与永恒野生巨龙在这些图案呈现方式上的差异，便提供了线索之一：当巨龙自身试图遮掩差别时（而这在顽皮的永恒丑角巨龙身上常有发生——它们会假装成更弱、更年轻的传统派，以便实施格外逗趣的恶作剧），谨慎而睿智的观察者便可借此分辨两者。

然而，这些线条对精明学者的价值，远不止于避免此等小把戏。事实上，通过研究这些图案之中的魔法流动，我们可以追踪野生巨龙神秘能量与生理结构的差异，从而获得一种视觉层面的洞见：看见“永恒之光”仪式的进程——而若无此法，通常得借助强大的魔法才能实现。

不过，这些鲜明图案并非野生巨龙所有五种传承所共享的唯一视觉线索。值得注意的是，所有野生巨龙的主鳞色——它们赖以得名之色——位于第三与第四色系的范围，而非红、蓝、绿巨龙所呈现的光之三原色。有些学者推测，这会使野生巨龙的性格或特性与最相近的原色相对应，并援引类比：例如红巨龙的傲慢与朱红巨龙的夸张。然而在我看来，这些理论毫无根据；不仅其他野生巨龙身上再无类似相似性可循，而且琥珀巨龙的颜色是介于橙与黄之间的第三色——而橙与黄本就不存在对应的色彩巨龙。

尽管我已反驳了该论题本身，但若不尝试解释这些所谓的“野生巨龙性格相似性”，这份概览仍不完整——至少要以那些相信此说的二流学者（往往并非巨龙）能理解的方式。他们这类平庸之辈总爱宣称野生巨龙比其他巨龙更“社交”，多半是因为他们欠缺对社会学的理解，只能在“合群”符合其愚蠢预设时才明白“好交际”究竟为何物。于是，他们看着琥珀巨龙的闲话、靛蓝巨龙的派对、丑角巨龙的锋利机智、朱红巨龙的夸夸其谈，便试图从中牵出一条幼稚的主线。更不必说，蔚蓝巨龙甚至根本不符合他们的叙事……

A brief and humble folio on the topic by Kallizandrex, Sage Aeternal.

Welcome to my most enlightening side venture, O reader of refined tastes. You might find it an unexpected pleasure to espy the meticulous work of your humble author, Kallizandrex, Sage Aeternal, when reading about dragons of a distinctly more traditionalist bent than my typical deep dives on the lux aeterna ritual would have led you to expect. Curious, are you? And if you haven't heard or read about the lux aeterna ritual that's taking the world by storm and allowing young dragons to adventure and reach their full potential in mere years, you simply must read my detailed findings. in Dragons and the Lux Aeterna Ritual (or, as some mortals have taken to calling it for whatever pedestrian reason, "Battlezoo Ancestries: Dragons"). But I digress.

There is, as in all things, an excellent explanation for my most unusual topic, and to tell that tale, I've collected a few fragments from my firsthand accounts of seeking out powerful wild dragons across the Indigo Isles and beyond, which you'll find enclosed in this most esteemed manuscript of mine.

Yes, those self-same Indigo Isles, of which you have no doubt heard in great detail from merchants and travelers alike... at least, unless you have your head so stuck into a locked guardian vault that you might be mistaken for a bronze dragon, forever stagnating away from the latest information without any knowledge from the field.

I must admit, the Indigo Isles are not the sort of place I would ordinarily champ at the bit to visit, what with their overall atmosphere. Nonetheless, the benefits outweighed the drawbacks, and so on a fateful expedition, your humble author went!

"But why?" you ask again, as any discerning reader should. I needed to chase down several leads in a rare correspondence from one of my few peers regarding the explanation behind the prevalence of aeternal dragons among the wild dragon family.

While this observation holds truth across the world, it has proved particularly true in the Indigo Isles, and the Isles are also home to more wild dragons than most other regions.

The timing of this happened to be serendipitous. With the new winner of the Dragon Overlord contest this decade seeking to explore more about the hidden dragons of the world, I just had to add a few details to my proposal indicating that I would be searching for information on dragons we've rarely researched before, like mirage dragons, mischief dragons, or even doom dragons. Succeed or fail, tailoring my research proposal in that way opened up grants, providing me the funding to explore the topics I'm genuinely interested in. Of course, now it might be necessary to produce a further manuscript detailing those other dragons at some future date, but more writing and further erudition are hardly hardships for a scholar such as myself.

And so, crucial funding in hand, I set sail for the Indigo Isles to seek out the answers to all these questions and more firsthand. While it's certainly more convenient to ask questions to a local with the relevant knowledge, when it comes to fieldwork, if you want it done right, you have to do it yourself. Otherwise, you can never be truly sure if the information you've uncovered is accurate or merely degraded second or third-hand until it becomes all but useless to a serious researcher.

So is this preface an apology to you, my loyal readers, for writing about traditionalist wild dragons in the pages that follow? Nay, for I would never apologize for excellence, even when it falls just askew of the subject of my most fervent research. However, instead, it provides an explanation as well as a sort of prologue to my journey, which you can trace by searching for letters with my seal denoting their authenticity as primary sources.

The Wild Dragon Family

And with that preamble aside, let's dive into the meat of the topic, as light on lux aeterna revelations as it may be: wild dragons, a family that, while not wholly endemic to the Indigo Isles, is certainly much more common in that self-same archipelago than it is elsewhere.

The first thing you might notice when looking at a group of wild dragons (as opposed to the many majestic dragons of other families, of course) is their tendency to be covered with mystiic tracings, patterns in a distinctly different coloration to that of their namesake scales. These serve a specific and vital function for all wild dragons as a means to channel magical energy throughout the wild dragon's body, a magical circulatory system akin to the way the very world uses ley lines. You can tell much about a wild dragon's magical pathways by carefully studying the coloration, vibrancy, and shape of those patterns. Indeed, the differences between the way these patterns present themselves among traditionalist wild dragons and aeternal wild dragons provide one of the clues that a careful and sagacious observer can use to disambiguate between the two when the dragons themselves seek to obfuscate the differences, as can often be the case with puckish aeternal harlequin dragons pretending to be weaker younger traditionalists in order to pull off an especially amusing prank.

The benefit these lines provide to a cunning scholar, however, goes far beyond the ability to avoid such simple trickery. Indeed, by studying the flow of magic within these patterns, we can trace the differences in a wild dragon's mystic energy and biology, allowing a visual insight into the progress of the lux aeterna ritual that would otherwise require powerful magic to actualize.

However, these distinctive patterns are not the only visual cues shared across all five heritages among wild dragons. Notably, all wild dragons' main scale colors, for which they owe their names, are in the range of tertiary and quaternary colors rather than the primary colors of light found in red, blue, and green dragons. Some scholars have speculated that this causes wild dragons' personalities or traits to correspond to the most similar primary color, citing parallels between a red dragon's arrogance and a vermilion dragon's exaggerations. However, as far as I'm concerned, there's no truth to these theories; not only do any further similarities fail to appear for any of the other wild dragons, but amber dragons are the tertiary color between orange and yellow, both of which lack a chromatic dragon in the first place.

Despite my refutation of the very subject matter in question, this overview would not be complete if I didn't try to explain these supposed similarities in personality among wild dragons, at least among those lesser scholars (often non-dragons) who believe such things. These mediocre sorts like to claim that wild dragons are more "social" than other dragons, mostly because they, due to a lack of understanding of sociology, can only comprehend the concept of being sociable when it conforms to their own foolish expectations. Thus, they look at the amber dragon's gossip, the indigo dragon's parties, the harlequin dragon's razor wit, and the vermilion dragon's tall tales and attempt to draw this jejune throughline. Not to mention, cerulean dragons don't even fit their narrative...

Amber Dragons.name: 琥珀巨龙 Amber Dragons
Amber Dragons.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.NwWtaAMb7zb0N7fd]{幼年琥珀巨龙} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.GXCs6Nt8Ak8ZaXCA]{幼年琥珀巨龙（施法者）}生物 7

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.D3lyoKUZjRV6wVOl]{成年琥珀巨龙} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.1kYyurW8IiTpw6WE]{成年琥珀巨龙（施法者）}生物 11

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.tGveuHWRady20Q23]{远古琥珀巨龙} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.YcadYu39AeUSuxme]{远古琥珀巨龙（施法者）}生物 16

琥珀巨龙是诸多巨龙之中最友善、最平易近人的种类之一。它们富有魅力、热情好客，并且痴迷于结交朋友。它们爱聊天，精通多种语言，而且总能知道些有用的事情。它们也是出色的倾听者，总是愿意耐心聆听并给出善意的鼓励，促使与之交际的人分享任何他们觉得有必要说出来的事。琥珀巨龙常被视为无害的八卦精，但它们远比人们给予的鸣谢更狡猾、更善于操控。

琥珀巨龙不只是话痨的爱管闲事者；它们是善于操纵的造谣者，最爱的事情莫过于打听并散播谣言。它们并不关心自己选择传播的流言是否为真。事实上，谣言越离奇，它们越可能去传播。它们只为自己的娱乐着想，并且总愿意给开始变得有些乏味的传闻添点润色或来个转折。它们是锲而不舍的搅局者，毫不在意自己的言语会毁掉多少人的人生。

琥珀巨龙偏好生活在人口稠密的环境中。通常这意味着城市环境，但它们住在人类城市或矮人要塞的可能性，与住在妖精飞地或一片健谈动物的树林里的可能性一样大。它们并不在乎周围环境，而在乎身边有多少聪明、且最重要的是健谈的生物。许多琥珀巨龙在很长一段time里都相当定居。它们喜欢在某个地区安顿下来，尽可能吸收其文化、人群与时事资讯。只要还能从自己的地盘里摘取更多流言，它们就会待着；一旦厌倦了，就会动身寻找一个新地区，好让自己再度渗透其中。要想抓住琥珀巨龙的注意力，一个地区必须人口密集，而其居民必须容易受操控。村落与小镇的规模不足以让琥珀巨龙长期保持兴致；而那些政府施行过多禁令、可能导致居民噤声或变得过度多疑的地方，也同样不行。

琥珀巨龙理解言语的力量，而多数还对文字情有独钟。与大多数巨龙相比，它们更可能收集并囤积珍稀书籍、卷轴与文献，对古老羊皮纸与雕刻的重视甚至超过黄金与宝石。它们往往会用守卫符文等魔法符记与其他防护印记来保护自己珍贵的私人藏书。

虽然很少有琥珀巨龙愿意承认，但它们其实是耐心而聪明的间谍，观察、倾听并操控周围发生的事件，以收集最鲜美的故事与八卦来散播。最年轻的琥珀巨龙最在意流言、新闻、时事与短命者的生活——这些都在不断变化。年长的琥珀巨龙更偏爱更持久的传闻、黑暗而古老的历史、禁忌典籍、神话与传奇，以及那些足以掀翻君主、引发社会革命并造成其他重大事件或动荡的谣言。

英奎斯提亚尔

英奎斯提亚尔，“活的藏书圣典”，是一条隐居的琥珀巨龙，维持着物质位面上规模最大的图书馆之一。其内，古老文献与禁忌魔典被妥善保存，远离窥探之眼——并置于巨龙的守护凝视之下。英奎斯提亚尔允许外人向他请愿以求入馆；而那些失败者，将再也不会被人见到。

在
活的藏书圣典英奎斯提亚尔的殿堂中

你也许早已习惯典型的健谈琥珀巨龙，它们为迎合自身的盘算，等量散播鲜美八卦、恶意谣言与有利宣传。但在通过了那严酷的试炼、得以一睹远古琥珀巨龙英奎斯提亚尔的传奇图书馆之后，我才彻底明白他与同族究竟有多么不同。大多数琥珀巨龙充其量只是难以管束、杂乱无章，而英奎斯提亚尔却将他宏伟收藏中的每一本书都记录得一清二楚——从主题到标题再到位置。他甚至记录了每一册的状态与颜色。他的藏书细目几乎与藏书本身一样令人叹为观止！他也向我明确表示，我应当同样小心地对待他的卷册，否则我将无法从获准的图书馆巢穴短居中归来。

我必须说，作为一名同道学者，我相当欣赏这条巨型书虫的谨慎。我在馆内发现了不止几处散布的魔法陷阱，它们是活的藏书圣典并不信任即便经过严苛审查的受邀宾客、也会在其领域内自律行事的神秘明证。更别提我在里面从未见到除主人之外的任何其他灵魂。我不禁猜想：在我逗留期间，我是否是唯一通过的申请者；又或是英奎斯提亚尔为了能亲自盯紧每一位访客而限制许可，以便更早发现任何问题，并避免对其藏书造成任何伤害。

至于图书馆的规模，亲爱的读者，它确如传闻那般浩瀚，几乎涵盖每一种主题；不过我也留意到了我认为缺失的一些学科。通常，这些都是近年才出现的新领域。我向主人询问此事，他解释说，他喜欢让一个领域先“腌一腌”，这样他就能收集该主题的各类学术著作，并涵盖所有观点。他坚持认为，当一个主题尚新时，视角是有限的，你只能看到其广度的一小部分。对英奎斯提亚尔而言，不完整的图景也许比一无所有更糟。我曾试图献上自己关于永恒巨龙的研究，以便为他补全该主题，但唉，他拒绝了。

——卡利赞德雷克斯，永恒贤者

秘密宝库

琥珀巨龙最珍视的财产，是它们只留给自己的秘密。大多数会将这些秘密牢记在心，但它们对文本的偏爱意味着许多会把秘密写下来，以文书或编码账本的形式保存。也有一些会保留一件与秘密相关的物体，使其作为一种可触的记忆触发。

情报掮客

有些琥珀巨龙会作为情报掮客工作。它们免费传播简单而有趣的谣言以引诱客户，然后对更敏感的情报与传闻收费。大多数只接受以秘密与个人信息作为报酬——非常适合转卖给其他客户！

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.NwWtaAMb7zb0N7fd]{Young Amber Dragon} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.GXCs6Nt8Ak8ZaXCA]{Young Amber Dragon (Spellcaster)}Creature 7

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.D3lyoKUZjRV6wVOl]{Adult Amber Dragon} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.1kYyurW8IiTpw6WE]{Adult Amber Dragon (Spellcaster)}Creature 11

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.tGveuHWRady20Q23]{Ancient Amber Dragon} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.YcadYu39AeUSuxme]{Ancient Amber Dragon (Spellcaster)}Creature 16

Amber dragons are among the friendliest and most approachable of dragons. They're charismatic, welcoming, and adore making friends. They love to chat, are fluent in numerous languages, and always know something useful. They're excellent listeners, always ready with a patient ear and kind encouragement, prodding those they socialize with to share whatever they feel the need to. Often seen as harmless gossips, amber dragons are far more cunning and manipulative than they're given credit for.

Amber dragons are more than chatty busybodies; they're manipulative rumormongers who adore nothing more than learning and spreading rumors. They have no interest in whether the gossip they choose to spread is true. In fact, the more outlandish a rumor, the more likely they are to spread it. They care for their own entertainment and are always willing to add a bit of embellishment or a twist to rumors that are getting a little stale. They're persistent meddlers who care not for the lives their words could ruin.

Amber dragons prefer to live in populous environments. Usually, this means urban environments, but they're just as likely to live within a human city or a dwarven fortress as they are in a fey enclave or a grove of talkative animals. They care not for their surroundings but for the number of intelligent and, most importantly, talkative creatures around them. Many are sedentary for large portions of time. They love to settle in a region and absorb all they can of its culture, people, and current events. So long as there are more rumors to pluck from their home, they stay, moving on when they grow bored to find a new region into which to insinuate themselves. To hold an amber dragon's attention, a region must be densely populated, and its inhabitants must be susceptible to manipulation. Hamlets and towns aren't big enough to keep an amber dragon amused for long, nor are places whose government enforces too many prohibitions that could cause its citizens to clam up or be overly suspicious.

Amber dragons understand the power of words, and most have a fondness for the written word. They're more likely to collect and hoard rare books, scrolls, and texts than most dragons, placing a higher value on old parchment and carvings than they do on gold and gemstones. They're prone to protecting their valuable personal libraries with glyphs of warding and other protective sigils.

While few amber dragons would admit it, they're patient and clever spies who watch, listen, and manipulate events around them to collect the juiciest tales and gossip to spread. The youngest amber dragons care most for gossip, news, current events, and the lives of the short-lived, which are constantly changing. Older amber dragons favor more lasting rumors, dark and ancient history, forbidden texts, myths, and legends, as well as rumors that could topple monarchs, cause a social revolution, and produce other major events or upheavals.

Inguistial

Inguistial, the "Living Libram," is a reclusive amber dragon who maintains one of the largest libraries on the Material Plane. Within, ancient texts and forbidden tomes are kept far from prying eyes—and under the dragon's protective gaze. Inguistial allows outsiders to petition him for entry; those who fail are never seen again.

In the Halls of
Inguistial the Living Libram

You might be used to the typical chatty amber dragon spreading juicy gossip, malicious rumors, and advantageous propaganda in equal measure to suit their own agenda. But after passing the grueling trials required to see the legendary library of the ancient amber dragon Inguistial, it became perfectly clear to me just how different he was from his brethren. Where most amber dragons are unruly and disorderly at best, Inguistial keeps careful track of every book in his grand collection, from topic to title to location. He even tracked the condition and color of each tome. The details of his collection were nearly as breathtaking as the collection itself! He also made it clear to me that I should take equal care of his volumes, lest I never return from my approved sojourn to his library lair.

I must say, as a fellow scholar, that I quite appreciate the enormous bookwyrm’s precautions. I spotted more than a few magical traps scattered across the place, mystic testaments to the fact that the Living Libram didn’t trust even scrupulously vetted invited guests to behave themselves within his domain. Not that I ever saw another soul within, save for my host. I wondered whether I was the only applicant who passed during my time there, or rather, if Inguistial limited access in order to keep a personal eye on each and every visitor, the better to notice any problems ahead of time and avoid any damage to his collection.

As for the scope of the library, gentle reader, it is as massive as they claim, with books on nearly every topic, though I made note of the subjects that I felt were missing. Typically, these were new fields only introduced in recent years. I asked my host about it, and he explained that he liked to let a field marinate a bit so that he could collect various scholarly works on the topic and cover all the sides. When a topic is new, he maintained, perspective is limited, and you only see a small portion of its scope. To Inguistial, an incomplete picture might be worse than having nothing at all. I offered my own work on aeternal dragons in an attempt to round out that topic for him, but alas, he declined.

— Kallizandrex, Sage Aeternal

Secret Hoards

An amber dragon's most prized possessions are the secrets they keep to themselves. Most keep these secrets memorized, but their fondness for texts means many write them down, keeping them as texts or coded ledgers. Some instead keep an object tied to the secret, which functions as a tactile memory trigger.

Information Brokers

Some amber dragons work as information brokers. They spread simple and entertaining rumors for free to tempt clients, then charge for more sensitive information and rumors. Most accept payment only in secrets and personal information— perfect for selling to other clients!

Cerulean Dragons.name: 天蓝巨龙 Cerulean Dragons
Cerulean Dragons.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.3uLtd7ndIVCn2sKY]{幼年天蓝巨龙} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.SNacmDdsHYwEBEwk]{幼年天蓝巨龙（施法者）} 生物 10

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.OnmQqxiLLm94kpCY]{成年天蓝巨龙} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.QM1cK3hKuxffMAc6]{成年天蓝巨龙（施法者）}生物 14

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.4Am34ofgiF3yBDwX]{远古天蓝巨龙} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.QUWayoa0xmmLNlcU]{远古天蓝巨龙（施法者）}生物 19

天蓝巨龙是巨龙世界的开路先锋：他们是掘进者、地城探险者与探索者，为了满足永无止境的好奇心，在未知之地绘制路线、开辟小径。天蓝巨龙为冒险而生，总是将自己逼得更快、更远、更深、更高，超越以往的极限。他们决心看看下一条走廊尽头有什么、紧闭的门后有什么、地平线之外有什么，并发现其他世界、位面与其他次元中存在着什么。他们探索异乎寻常的地点与神秘的奇观，从不满足于无所事事或久坐不动，也从不畏惧命运可能为他们准备的惊喜或未来可能带来的危险。

天蓝巨龙满怀永恒的漂泊渴望与不减的旅行热情。他们的生活节奏飞快，因此更喜欢始终在路上。大多数天蓝巨龙不保留传统巢穴；与其被奢华生活束缚在同一处地点，他们更偏爱在荒野间、在千百种不同的天空下度过一生。有些天蓝巨龙则偏好魔法居所与异界的领域——当他们足够强大且足够年长、能够创造它们时——这让他们能同时拥有舒适的生活与冒险的生活。

天蓝巨龙对周遭世界及其所包含的一切都充满难以置信的好奇。他们喜欢把鼻子伸到不该伸的地方，越界而行，打破各种禁忌。他们爱窥探，但与其去翻人们隐藏的过往与家族秘密，他们更可能去撬开上锁的门、闯入禁入之地。与琥珀巨龙不同，他们对人们生活的细枝末节，或散落在城市街道上的流言蜚语与尴尬丑事并不过分感兴趣。这并不意味着他们排斥交朋友——恰恰相反，天蓝巨龙乐于结识新朋友并建立友谊，尤其愿意与志同道合的探索者与冒险者建立合作关系，以便协作。

尽管天蓝巨龙喜欢结识新朋友、发现稀有宝藏并学习失落的秘密，但对他们而言，没有什么比前往新的地方更令人兴奋。探索一个对他们而言彻底新颖且未知之地最能让天蓝巨龙心潮澎湃，不论该地点对社会、历史，或对获取财富以扩充其藏财的强效重要性（或缺乏重要性）如何。

在年轻时，许多天蓝巨龙主要专注于普通的旅行形式。他们造访从未见过的城市与聚居地，闯入金库，跋涉穿过下水道，开启墓穴。他们探索大片荒野，攀登群山，洞穴探勘，穿游沼泽，潜入湖泊与海洋之下。待到长大后，大多数天蓝巨龙更偏好探索更危险的地点，例如闹鬼的庄园、沉没的船只、偏远的神殿、远古遗迹，以及——常见的最爱——地城。

随着时代推移，大多数天蓝巨龙必须走得越来越远，才能找到自己从未去过的地方并满足漂泊渴望。在这段时期，多数会走向极端，探入最深的深渊与最遥远、最难以抵达的地区，旅行至其他位面与星球，甚至前往其他时代与次元。这是深入怪异、狂野与完全不可置信之物的时代。

泽梅德里隆

“永寻者”泽梅德里隆或许是异界探索方面最伟大的专家，他亲自探索过23个位面，其中包括两个目前仍未证实其存在的位面。多数人相信泽梅德里隆在30年前试图开启通往遥远未来的传送门时被汽化——而天蓝巨龙认为这种说法可笑至极。他们坚称这头远古巨龙成功抵达了未来，并将在足够长的时代过去之后再度现身。

寻找永寻者：
泽梅德里隆的线索

“永寻者”泽梅德里隆令我极感兴趣，因为有传言称，lux aeterna 仪式的其中一项材料，与泽梅德里隆在数百年前发现的某个新位面之一存在一种奇术学上的联系。若此事为真，就意味着泽梅德里隆可能握有一条线索，哪怕再微不足道，也能指向该仪式的创造者（或诸位创造者）的身份，而我必须查明真相！不幸的是，正如你无疑知道的那样，亲爱的读者，泽梅德里隆在试图穿越某种时间裂隙后便失踪了数十年。我在英奎斯提亚尔的图书馆搜罗了所有细节，这至少足以追踪到这头永寻的天蓝巨龙最后已知的位置；随后我向一位技艺娴熟的时间巨龙讨了个人情，请他分析该区域残留的魔法特征。唉，时代是个永远精明且不可阻挡的盗贼，我所有的联络人能告诉我的，只有时间魔法确实曾在场。

—— 卡利赞德雷克斯，永恒智者

冒险者队伍

天蓝巨龙常常为了探索目的而结成紧密的小队，每一头巨龙都专精于某一研究领域或探索方向。一些学者认为，传统“冒险者队伍”的概念正是源自天蓝巨龙——这一完全缺乏证据且无法证实的说法令多数短命凡人颇为恼火。

移动藏财

如同大多数冒险者，天蓝巨龙会把自己的财富以贵重魔法物品、远古器物、珍贵珠宝与其他可穿戴财富的形式随身携带。因此，尽管天蓝巨龙缺少真正的藏财，他们往往会穿戴（或挥舞！）一笔巨额财富。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.3uLtd7ndIVCn2sKY]{Young Cerulean Dragon} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.SNacmDdsHYwEBEwk]{Young Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster)} Creature 10

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.OnmQqxiLLm94kpCY]{Adult Cerulean Dragon} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.QM1cK3hKuxffMAc6]{Adult Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster)}Creature 14

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.4Am34ofgiF3yBDwX]{Ancient Cerulean Dragon} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.QUWayoa0xmmLNlcU]{Ancient Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster)}Creature 19

Cerulean dragons are the trailblazers of the dragon world, the delvers, the dungeoneers, and the explorers, charting paths and blazing trails through lands unknown to them to sate their neverending curiosity. Cerulean dragons live for adventure and are always pushing themselves faster, further, deeper, and higher than they've ever gone before. They're determined to see what's down the next hall, behind the closed door, beyond the horizon, and discover what lies on other worlds, planes, and other dimensions. They explore unusual sites and mysterious wonders, never content to be idle or sedentary, and never afraid of what surprises fate might have in store for them or what dangers the future may hold.

Cerulean dragons are filled with an eternal wanderlust and an unabating passion for travel. They live a fast-paced life, and thus they prefer to stay on the move at all times. Most cerulean dragons don't keep traditional lairs, preferring a life lived in the wilderness and under a thousand different skies rather than a life of luxury shackled to the same place. Some cerulean dragons prefer magical homes and extraplanar domains—when they're powerful and old enough to create them—which allow them a life of comfort and a life of adventure all at once.

Cerulean dragons are incredibly curious about the world around them and all it contains. They enjoy sticking their noses where they don't belong, treading beyond boundaries, and breaking taboos of all sorts. They're snoops, though they're far more likely to pry behind locked doors and into off-limit locations than they are to delve into people's hidden pasts and family secrets. They're not overly interested in the details of people's lives or the gossip and embarrassments scattered down city streets, unlike amber dragons. It's not that they're averse to making friends—on the contrary, cerulean dragons are interested in meeting new people and forging friendships, particularly working relationships with other like-minded explorers and adventurers with whom they can collaborate.

While cerulean dragons enjoy meeting new people, discovering rare treasures, and learning lost secrets, nothing is more exciting to them than traveling somewhere new. Exploring a place that's completely new and unknown to them excites cerulean dragons the most, regardless of that location's greater importance (or lack thereof) to society, history, or the acquisition of wealth to grow their hoard.

In their youth, many cerulean dragons focus primarily on ordinary forms of travel. They visit cities and settlements they've never seen before, breaking into vaults, trudging through sewers, and opening tombs. They explore tracts of wilderness, climbing mountains, spelunking through caves, swimming through swamps, and diving beneath lakes and oceans. By the time they're grown, most cerulean dragons prefer to explore more dangerous locations, such as haunted manors, sunken ships, remote temples, ancient ruins, and—a common favorite—dungeons.

As time passes, most cerulean dragons must go further and further to find places they've never been and fulfill their wanderlust. During this time, most go to extremes, plumbing the deepest depths and the most distant and inaccessible regions, traveling to other planes and planets, or even to other times and dimensions. It's a time to delve into the weird, the wild, and the utterly unbelievable.

Zemedrilon

Zemedrilon the Ever-Seeking is perhaps the greatest expert on extraplanar exploration, having personally explored 23 planes, including two whose existence is currently unconfirmed. Most believe Zemedrilon was vaporized 30 years ago while attempting to open a portal to the distant future—a tale cerulean dragons consider laughable. They insist the ancient dragon successfully arrived in the future and, after a long enough time has passed, will reemerge.

In Search of the Ever-Seeking:
Zemedrilon’s Clue

Zemedrilon the Ever-Seeking is of great interest to me, as there have been rumors that one of the components of the lux aeterna ritual has a thaumaturgical connection to one of the new planes Zemedrilon discovered centuries ago. If that's true, that could mean Zemedrilon has a clue, however minor, to the identity of the ritual's creator (or creators), and I must learn the truth! Unfortunately, as you no doubt know, dear reader, Zemedrilon has been missing for decades after attempting to pass through some sort of temporal rift. I sought out all the details in Inguistial's library, which was enough to at least track down the ever-seeking cerulean wyrm's last known location, and I called in a favor with a skilled time dragon to analyze the magical signatures remaining in the area. Alas, time is a thief who is ever-savvy and unstoppable, and all my contacts could tell me was that time magic had indeed been present.

— Kallizandrex, Sage Aeternal

Adventuring Parties

Cerulean dragons often band together into tightly knit teams for the purpose of exploration, with each dragon specializing in a field of study or exploratory focus. Some scholars believe it's from cerulean dragons that the concept of the traditional "adventuring party" was born—a completely unsubstantiated and unprovable claim that irks most short- lived mortals.

Mobile Hoards

Like most adventurers, cerulean dragons carry their wealth on them in the form of valuable magic items, ancient artifacts, valuable jewelry, and other wearable wealth. Thus, while a cerulean dragon lacks a true hoard, they often wear (or wield!) a fortune.

Harlequin Dragons.name: 丑角巨龙 Harlequin Dragons
Harlequin Dragons.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.MnKYdy5Vqi01YP7e]{年轻丑角巨龙} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.3EMnWU9OEW134WPc]{年轻丑角巨龙（施法者）}生物 6

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.oX8equ4dxaTMOzSa]{成年丑角巨龙} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.qZlZPjwPqcchYS2Z]{成年丑角巨龙（施法者）}生物 10

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.G85QhcWyScJW8g8S]{远古丑角巨龙} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.LqZ1SAO644ZarcB0]{远古丑角巨龙（施法者）}生物 15

丑角巨龙是终极喜剧家：机敏而富有洞察力的弄臣，以智谋与世界周旋，一边上演轻松的恶作剧，一边喷吐狡黠的侮辱、机智的俏皮话与令人捧腹的笑话。尽管它们显得轻佻，丑角巨龙的戏谑却蕴含更深的意义，往往把聚光灯打在社会的怪癖、逻辑谬误与个人真相之上。

丑角巨龙的洞察力惊人，并以能够一眼评估人、局势，甚至社会风俗为傲。它们擅长从对象的外在举止中辨识隐藏的动机、情感与偏见，常常挖出连对象自己都尚未察觉的秘密。随后，丑角巨龙会用幽默将这些洞见揭示给对象：以机智的笑话、嘲弄与恶作剧作掩饰，把更深层的含义藏在其中，并让其在自省与经历中浮现。大多数丑角巨龙希望对象能够解开并理解它们所传递的感知，从而带来有意义的个人启示与积极的改变。借由这些手段，它们希望自己不请自来的忠告能扎根，并影响哪怕最沉默寡言、最顽固、最停滞不前的对象，使其踏上自我启示与成长之路。就这样，丑角巨龙的幽默成了一面镜子，把对象的动机与缺陷照回给他们。对象是否接受并从这些倒影中学习，仍掌握在他们自己手中。丑角巨龙可以提供启示与引导，但真正的改变必须发自内心。

丑角巨龙认为自己极其聪明、风趣而且睿智。它们尖刻又讽刺（但很少出于恶意），这可能会令与之交互的人神经紧绷。与大多数巨龙一样，它们很骄傲。它们希望他人欣赏自己、自己的机智与自己的感知；当它们的戏谑遭到冷漠或无视时，便会伤到自尊。被冷落的丑角巨龙通常会用这样的“认知”安慰自己：不欣赏它们笑话的人不过是不够聪明，无法把握其中更深的意义；于是丑角巨龙会把这种蠢货视作浪费吐息。更糟的是，有些对象能理解丑角巨龙戏谑中隐藏的教训，却要么学不会，要么拒绝接受这些启示，认为其有误或忠告站不住脚。这样的冒犯与顽固的傲慢很少能让丑角巨龙消沉太久。

丑角巨龙总是在狩猎新观众——这一习惯让它们始终在路上。它们热爱旅行，也很少长期保有巢穴（如果它们真的有巢穴的话）。它们偏好城镇区域或能与聪明生物交谈、表演的地区；它们讨厌孤独，也很容易厌倦。当丑角巨龙相遇时，往往会演变成一场弄臣决斗：一场娱乐性十足、节奏飞快的唇枪舌剑与爆笑机锋之战，来来回回甚至能持续数日。

丑角巨龙知道，绝不该以掩蔽来评判一本书，也不该以外貌或环境来评判一个生物。它们以不仅能看见生物当下的状态，也能看见其未来潜力为傲，并自认为是评判角色的行家。丑角巨龙不会把精力浪费在拒绝倾听的人身上，也不会浪费在那些会利用它们由巨龙赐予的洞见为世界带来邪恶的人身上；相反，它们致力于向自己所娱乐的人提供引导与帮助，让世界比它们到来时更美好。

塔瓦拉瓦特

在所有丑角巨龙中，最具传奇色彩的莫过于塔瓦拉瓦特：这位弄臣洞察深刻、妙趣横生，以至于引起了异界存在的注意，并踏上穿越外环的旅程。人们相信，塔瓦拉瓦特居于涅槃天，以令人愉悦的嘲弄与发自内心的喜悦，引导阿伽西翁与天使走向自我启蒙。

苍天弄臣：
塔瓦拉瓦特的戏谑

苍天弄臣塔瓦拉瓦特或许并非永恒丑角巨龙，但她始终令我兴趣盎然。我对她在历史长河中、引起诸位面居民兴趣之前，介入凡人事务的种种行径尤感好奇。据说她曾在揭示一位残酷皇帝的内心真相时，让那位皇帝落泪。可即便如此，也仍不及另一个故事：据称她以一连串高妙至极的戏谑，阻止了一场发生在凡人与善恶势力之间的三方战斗——那些戏谑之崇高，竟令天使将军堕落、恶魔将军叛逃，之后二者又与凡人女王携手同盟。尤其值得注意的是，塔瓦拉瓦特与泽梅德里隆乃旧识。我并不乐意前往涅槃天那些和平主义的伪善者之地，但无论是幸运还是不幸，我却在这凡人世界恰好遇见了她。若塔拉瓦拉特确已前行，我想她仍会偶尔回到此处。可惜啊，亲爱的读者，她借机取笑并迷惑我对研究的追问，而不是回答我的问题。

——卡利赞德雷克斯，永恒贤者

丑角的宝藏堆

与多数巨龙不同，许多丑角巨龙并不在乎黄金、珠宝或无价宝藏，而更看重机敏的俏皮话、诙谐的笑话、某个格外难以捉摸的魔法戏法之秘，以及所有宝藏中最珍贵的：笑声。

嘲弄死神

邪恶的丑角巨龙也被称作“嘲弄死神”，它们利用自身能力塑造忠诚的爪牙，以操纵他人、揭露秘密、毁掉人生、颠覆社会。它们的笑话残酷而碾压，永远把对象逼进尘埃，或推向更深的悲伤与绝望。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.MnKYdy5Vqi01YP7e]{Young Harlequin Dragon} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.3EMnWU9OEW134WPc]{Young Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster)}Creature 6

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.oX8equ4dxaTMOzSa]{Adult Harlequin Dragon} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.qZlZPjwPqcchYS2Z]{Adult Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster)}Creature 10

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.G85QhcWyScJW8g8S]{Ancient Harlequin Dragon} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actors.Actor.LqZ1SAO644ZarcB0]{Ancient Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster)}Creature 15

Harlequin dragons are the ultimate comedians, clever and insightful jesters who match wits with the world, playing light-hearted pranks while spouting cunning insults, witty quips, and hilarious jokes. Despite their obvious frivolity, a harlequin dragon's jests contain deeper meaning, often shining a spotlight on societal idiosyncrasies, logical fallacies, and personal truths.

Harlequin dragons are incredibly insightful, and they pride themselves on being able to assess people, situations, and even social mores at a glance.
